verses.greek: καὶ ἦν ἐτῶν πεντήκοντα ὀκτὼ ὅτε ἀπώλεσεν τὰς ὄψεις, καὶ μετὰ ἔτη ὀκτὼ ἀνέβλεψεν· καὶ ἐποίει ἐλεημοσύνας, καὶ προσεθέτο φοβεῖσθαι

notes: Extracted only Tobit XIV verses visible in the provided chapter-opening page. The transcription/images supplied include only the start of chapter 14 on p862, with verses 1 and the beginning of verse 2 visible; the remainder of the chapter is not present in the provided materials, so only extant visible text could be returned.
